creator: alc@cs.rice.edu
text:
I've been using the following /etc/hosts.equiv file for several months.

+@cs

(cs is a valid netgroup.)  Over the weekend of the 11 and 12th, I sup'ed
the current sources for stable and did a make world.  Subsequent to this
the netgroup in hosts.equiv has stopped functioning.  E.g., I now get
prompted for a password to rlogin.
